Adams County.description: Adams County supports a diversified economy based on tourism, agriculture, healthcare services, transportation, hospitality, and local commerce. Visitor spending and farming operations contribute significantly to economic activity throughout the county.

Ashland County.description: Ashland County benefits from tourism, healthcare services, forestry-related industries, education, transportation, and local business development. Natural resources and visitor-related industries contribute substantially to workforce opportunities and economic growth.
